summary: Preset simple-change resolves to implementation with no capabilities and should scaffold spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md plus runtime description.json and graph-metadata.json.
Preset arch-change resolves to implementation plus qa-verification and architecture-decisions, producing checklist.md and decision-record.md in addition to implementation core docs.
Preset phase-parent must rely on explicit kind metadata because a newly scaffolded childless phase parent cannot be detected by child-directory structure alone.

graphEvents.relationship: should not override explicit contract kind

summary: The proposed greenfield invocation uses --name and an explicit target path, but iteration 007's create.sh diff does not add that parser surface.
fix: Update .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/create.sh to parse --name and an optional explicit target directory, bypassing branch-derived FEATURE_DIR when the target is supplied.

summary: Validator Step 7 cannot reliably read kind and capabilities from packet frontmatter because the proposed scaffold path only snapshots the contract in graph-metadata.json.
fix: Add templateContract YAML frontmatter emission in .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/template-utils.sh and make template_contract_for_folder read spec.md frontmatter before metadata fallback.

summary: check-template-headers.sh cannot complete the manifest-driven pipeline until template-structure.js implements compare-manifest with inline-gate-aware expected headers.
fix: Implement compare-manifest in .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/utils/template-structure.js using the manifest doc template, the resolved packet contract, and the shared inline-gate renderer.

summary: description.json and graph-metadata.json can diverge unless both are emitted from the same resolved template contract during scaffold.
fix: Make .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/dist/spec-folder/generate-description.js accept or read the resolved template contract and write description.json.templateContract in the same transaction as graph-metadata.json.derived.template_contract.

summary: The flat requiredAnchors shape from iteration 007 would apply every anchor to every file; the manifest needs requiredAnchorsByFile for correct validator output.
fix: Change manifest_required_sections in .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/template-utils.sh to emit rows from sectionProfiles[].requiredAnchorsByFile.

summary: json_number with a dotted path cannot address literal file keys such as spec.md, so count validation can silently fall back to zero.
fix: Replace dotted-path lookup in .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/rules/check-section-counts.sh with a helper that accepts object key segments such as h2ByFile and spec.md separately.
